RichText.Text: 1. do intense workouts 2. make you more productive 3. a rewarding experience in reward for reward sb. for doing sth. reward sb. with sth. 4. set your directions 5 support a particular cause 6. take one's responsibilities for ... be responsible for... 7. align with your association’s purpose 8. be inclusive and cover the diverse interests of sb. 9. a joint tree planting event 10. celebrate the contributions of your members make contributions to our society 11. the key to success the key to doing ... 12. take on leadership roles and responsibility

TextRun.Text: 12. 成功的关键；做某事的关键

RichText.Text: 1. 进行高强度的/剧烈的锻炼 2. 让你做事更高效的 3. 一段有益的/值得的经历 作为对…… 的回报 （n.） 因某事奖赏某人 (v.) 用某物酬谢某人 4. 设定/确定目标方向 5. 支持某项特殊的事业 6. 承担…… 的责任 对…… 负责 7. 与社团宗旨相一致 8. 包容大众的，包含众人不同爱好 9. 联合的/共同的植树活动 10. 表彰成员们的贡献 11. 为社会做贡献 12. 成功的关键；做某事的关键 13. 承担/担当领导职务和责任
